actions.description:
The entire email message in an RFC 2822 formatted and base64url encoded string. Sample: base64_encode(FROM: test@example.com
TO: recipient@example.com
subject: subject

This is the body)

https://gmail.googleapis.com/gmail/v1/users/{userId}/messages/send
actions.label: Notify_Analyst
actions.name: post_send_mail

value_replace.value:
SECURITY ALERT - SOC Lab Detection

Alert:       $exec.search_name
Host:        $exec.result._raw.agent.name
IP:          $exec.result._raw.agent.ip
Rule ID:     $exec.result._raw.rule.id
Description: $exec.result._raw.rule.description
Severity:    $exec.result._raw.rule.level
Tactic:      $exec.result._raw.rule.mitre.tactic
Technique:   $exec.result._raw.rule.mitre.id
Timestamp:   $exec.result._raw.timestamp

INVESTIGATION SOP:
https://github.com/filipperichta/soar-lab-security/blob/main/ir-reports/T1059.001-powershell-execution.md

SPLUNK RESULTS:
$exec.results_link

CONTAINMENT STEPS:
1. Isolate win-endpoint from network
2. Kill suspicious PowerShell processes
3. Review Windows Event Log 4104
4. Check for persistence mechanisms
5. Reset credentials for affected accounts
